'''Luxiar 7''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Luxiar system/Legends|Luxiar system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. There, [[R'Ytha Myr]] dated a person called "Ace", most probably [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] himself.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
